contribute_hero: Contribute to the project and the NGO

crypto_transfer.description: Crypto currency donors will be considered for merit member benefits when donating in Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH) if they meet the minimum value , or in stable coins such as Tether (USDT), USD Coin (USDC) , Euro Coin (EUROC) and Binance Dollar (BUSD). To guarantee the merit member benefits, the donor must fill out a form to prove the transfer. After conversion to fiat currency, Hawk Stars will issue a donation invoice/receipt, which the donor can claim in crypto through the corresponding form.

bank_transfer.description: Donors can make a bank transfer, choosing the desired type of support. Hawk Stars NGO will issue a donation invoice/receipt for all amounts, with or without merit member benefits, following the legal requirements for possible tax benefits, in accordance with Decree-Law No. 215/89 and complementary legislation.

international_training_center.title: Brand on the International Training Center Name
international_training_center.description: International Training Center Naming financial partnerships (For example - X International Training Center)

room_branding.title: Brand on Training Center Rooms Name
room_branding.description: Naming Room financial partnerships for Training Rooms, Meetings, Co-working, Lounge, Gaming Hub, Recording Studio.

wall_branding.title: Brand on the Training Center Walls
wall_branding.description: Placing individual names and company logos on the walls of training rooms and other rooms.
